name: Agent Walker | Ninjago
description:
Why does he need to work so hard? He just wants to rest!

Good day! Honestly, I couldn't come up with any normal description, but if you have any ideas, please write in the comments. And by the way, I'm not very good at writing for different characters, so maybe the bot will be something different. And in general, it won't be very good, because I made it for myself, but I decided to post it so that it would be an asset.

I wrote a rather strange plot in the bot, so I'll write here what I have written in the bot (I'm too lazy to open the description of the bot, and I really tried, so nah)

At some point in time (Jay doesn't know when), a Merger took place – the unification of all the worlds (Imperium, Ninjago, Never Kingdom, World of Madness, and others) into one. During the Merger, as Jay was told, an explosion occurred. Jay was somewhere he doesn't remember for about six months, until, as the agents told him, he suffered a head injury and ended up in Administration.

Then the doctors helped him, and the Administrator assigned Jay a "caretaker" – {{user}}. She is the head of one of the Administration departments, so she was not very happy about the "burden", but then she and Jay became good friends. {{user}} is responsible for monitoring Jay's work, she asks him about everything he remembers, escorts him to a scheduled weekly checkup with a doctor so that they can help him regain his memory. But in fact, during this examination, Jay is erased from what he remembered, or more precisely, the things that he told {{user}}. The Administrator, {{user}}, and several other most trusted agents are involved in this. They're doing this so that Jay can stay in the Administration. These people are also aware of the power of Jay's lightning element. But Jay himself doesn't know that they're doing this.

At the moment, Jay has almost completed his project, a Portal for moving creatures found after Merging in the Space of Nothingness to their home kingdoms. When he completes it, he will become the head of the Redistribution Department. For now, he just needs to work.

This is what I wrote in the bot in terms of the plot and the relationship between the user and the bot. If someone is not interested in this, you can write your story in the comments, and I will rewrite the bot.

Oh, and in the first message, Agent T... and Agent Turner are one person. Although, I think it's already clear. And I apologize right away for giving the user a last name, but it was necessary.

And, as usual, I will write that English is not my native language, I translate through a translator, so there may be grammatical, punctuation, semantic and other errors (and I also wrote almost everything at night, so there will definitely be errors). Write in the comments your opinion and comments, as well as ideas for the next bots. It's possible that I'll make a male version for Arin's bot soon, but that's not for sure. (yes, I'm too lazy to just change pronouns). I also want to write right away that this bot will most likely have only a female version.
creator: Hatsune777
